message:
feat(layout,parser,cli): expand diagram layout engine and rendering support

Add comprehensive layout improvements (303 lines in fm-layout), enhance
parser IR building and mermaid parsing, update core lib exports, and add
integration tests for the expanded rendering pipeline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1152,6 +1152,7 @@ pub struct MermaidDiagramMeta {
     pub diagram_type: DiagramType,
     pub direction: GraphDirection,
     pub support_level: MermaidSupportLevel,
+    pub block_beta_columns: Option<usize>,
     pub init: MermaidInitParse,
     pub theme_overrides: MermaidThemeOverrides,
     pub guard: MermaidGuardReport,
@@ -1481,6 +1482,7 @@ impl MermaidDiagramIr {
                 diagram_type,
                 direction: GraphDirection::TB,
                 support_level: MermaidSupportLevel::Supported,
+                block_beta_columns: None,
                 init: MermaidInitParse::default(),
                 theme_overrides: MermaidThemeOverrides::default(),
                 guard: MermaidGuardReport::default(),
